name: Sausage & Macaroni Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Saute sausage meat until lightly browned. Drain fat, then separate the meat using a fork and set aside.
3. Saute onion, garlic, and mushrooms.
4. Add the sausage meat, spices, sauce, macaroni, and stir.
5. Alternate layers of macaroni-meat mixture and cottage cheese, ending with meat.
6. Top with breadcrumbs and cheese if desired.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes. SERVES: 4
